basic_details.job_title: NSU Imphal Teaching & Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 JE, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Sports University (NSU), Imphal, Manipur - a Central University under the Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports, Government of India - has released Advertisement No. 13/2026 (F.No.11/NSU/EST-POST(CS)/2026, dated 10/07/2026) inviting applications for engagement on Contractual Teaching and Non-Teaching Posts. The engagement is purely temporary, initially for a period of one year, and may be extended further on a need basis. This article covers every detail available in the official notification, including vacancy details, eligibility, remuneration, application fee, selection process, and

important_dates.interview_date: Not specified in the notification. The notification states that the interview will likely be held at short notice, and applicants must regularly check www.nsu.ac.in for updates.

application_fee.details: A non-refundable processing fee of Rs. 1,000/- must accompany the application, for all candidates except SC/ST/PWD and Women candidates. Fee is payable to: HDFC Bank, Chingmeirong Branch, Account No. 50100366687337, IFSC: HDFC0004744, in favour of National Sports University 01. The transaction slip for the fee deposited must be enclosed along with the application form.

age_limit.age_details: Temporary, initially for 1 year, extendable on need basis
age_limit.details: Junior Engineer (Civil): 35 years Public Relations Officer: 40 years | No age limit is mentioned in the notification for any of the Teaching posts (Assistant Professor positions).

qualification.details: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Sports Coaching/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university, OR A Master's Degree in Physical Education (M.P.Ed.) as per NCTE and UGC norms, or M.Sc. (Sports Sciences), Master in Sports Science (MSS), or Master in Physical Education and Sports (M.P.E.S.) as per UGC norms, with not less than 55% marks, along with a Diploma/Post Graduate Diploma in Sports Coaching in the respective discipline (Athletics/Shooting/Weightlifting/Badminton) from a recognized Sports Institute, Indian University, or an equivalent qualification from an accredited foreign university. | Note: NET/SLET/SET is not required for the Sports Coaching discipline, as these eligibility tests are not conducted by the UGC, CSIR, or any other UGC-recognized agency for this discipline. | Desirable: Experience in teaching, training, or coaching sportspersons at National-level or higher competitions; evidence of participation in national/international competitions, coaching, athlete development programmes, sports performance projects, or sports science support services. | A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Physical Education or an allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC, OR must have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the UGC (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 (and their amendments), in which case NET is exempted. | A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Must have cleared NET conducted by UGC or CSIR, or a similar UGC-accredited test like SLET/SET, OR must have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree as per UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016 (and amendments), in which case NET/SLET/SET is exempted. | Note: NET/SLET/SET is also not required for Master's programmes in disciplines for which these tests are not conducted by UGC, CSIR, or a similar UGC-accredited body. | Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in the relevant field from a recognized Institute/University with one year of relevant experience, OR Diploma in Engineering in the relevant field with three years' experience in the relevant field in CPWD/State PWD or similar organized services/statutory or autonomous organizations/Central or State Universities/autonomous institutions, or a reputed private construction company with an annual turnover of at least Rs. 200 Crores or more. | Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade B in the UGC 7-point scale in Journalism and Mass Communication from a recognized University/Institute. At least five years' experience in the editorial department/centre of any Central/State Govt. department, PSU, Central/State Educational Institutions, an established English/regional Newspaper accredited with ABC, National News Agencies, Radio or Television, Film Media, or a reputed advertising agency, with excellent command of speaking in English, Hindi, and the Regional Language. Desirable: Good working knowledge of computer applications.

selection_process: Selection will be made based on the candidate's previous records and performance in the Interview. Applicants with higher qualifications

and experience required for a specific sport will be given preference. The Selection Committee may decide its own method of evaluating candidates' performance in the interview. Candidates must present themselves for the interview at the place and time specified
at their own expense (no TA/DA mentioned as being provided). The interview is likely to be held at short notice; candidates should regularly check www.nsu.ac.in for updates.
The notification does not specify a written test as part of the selection process; selection is stated to be based on records and interview performance only.
how_to_apply: The duly completed application form, along with self-attested scanned/photocopies of testimonials, certificates, and supporting documents, must reach the following address by post or by hand, on or before 09/08/2026:
The Registrar, National Sports University, 2nd Floor, Olympic Bhavan, Khuman Lampak Sports Complex, Imphal - 795001
Candidates must mention "Application for the post of (Contractual)" on top of the envelope.
Submission of the hard copy of the application form along with all supporting documents is mandatory.
Applications received only through email, without the corresponding hard copy, will not be considered.
Separate applications must be submitted for each post applied for.

content_sections.heading: NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: National Sports University Imphal (NSU Imphal) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 11 JE, Assistant Professor and More Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline through the official NSU Imphal website. The last date to submit the application form is 09-08-2026. In this article, you’ll find the NSU Imphal JE, Assistant Professor and More Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Offline application form. Download NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Teaching Post Vacancy Details
NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Non-Teaching Post Vacancy Details
NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Sports Coaching/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university, OR A Master's Degree in Physical Education (M.P.Ed.) as per NCTE and UGC norms, or M.Sc. (Sports Sciences), Master in Sports Science (MSS), or Master in Physical Education and Sports (M.P.E.S.) as per UGC norms, with not less than 55% marks, along with a Diploma/Post Graduate Diploma in Sports Coaching in the respective discipline (Athletics/Shooting/Weightlifting/Badminton) from a recognized Sports Institute, Indian University, or an equivalent qualification from an accredited foreign university. Note: NET/SLET/SET is not required for the Sports Coaching discipline, as these eligibility tests are not conducted by the UGC, CSIR, or any other UGC-recognized agency for this discipline. Desirable: Experience in teaching, training, or coaching sportspersons at National-level or higher competitions; evidence of participation in national/international competitions, coaching, athlete development programmes, sports performance projects, or sports science support services. A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Physical Education or an allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Must have cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC, OR must have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the UGC (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 (and their amendments), in which case NET is exempted. A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Must have cleared NET conducted by UGC or CSIR, or a similar UGC-accredited test like SLET/SET, OR must have been awarded a Ph.D. Degree as per UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016 (and amendments), in which case NET/SLET/SET is exempted. Note: NET/SLET/SET is also not required for Master's programmes in disciplines for which these tests are not conducted by UGC, CSIR, or a similar UGC-accredited body. Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology in the relevant field from a recognized Institute/University with one year of relevant experience, OR Diploma in Engineering in the relevant field with three years' experience in the relevant field in CPWD/State PWD or similar organized services/statutory or autonomous organizations/Central or State Universities/autonomous institutions, or a reputed private construction company with an annual turnover of at least Rs. 200 Crores or more. Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade B in the UGC 7-point scale in Journalism and Mass Communication from a recognized University/Institute. At least five years' experience in the editorial department/centre of any Central/State Govt. department, PSU, Central/S

content_sections.heading: NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Junior Engineer (Civil): 35 years Public Relations Officer: 40 years No age limit is mentioned in the notification for any of the Teaching posts (Assistant Professor positions).

content_sections.heading: NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: A non-refundable processing fee of Rs. 1,000/- must accompany the application, for all candidates except SC/ST/PWD and Women candidates. Fee is payable to: HDFC Bank, Chingmeirong Branch, Account No. 50100366687337, IFSC: HDFC0004744, in favour of National Sports University 01. The transaction slip for the fee deposited must be enclosed along with the application form.

content_sections.heading: NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be made based on the candidate's previous records and performance in the Interview. Applicants with higher qualifications, merit, specialization, and experience required for a specific sport will be given preference. The Selection Committee may decide its own method of evaluating candidates' performance in the interview. Candidates must present themselves for the interview at the place and time specified, at their own expense (no TA/DA mentioned as being provided). The interview is likely to be held at short notice; candidates should regularly check www.nsu.ac.in for updates. The notification does not specify a written test as part of the selection process; selection is stated to be based on records and interview performance only.

content_sections.heading: NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 Documents Required
content_sections.text: Duly completed application form (in all respects) Self-attested scanned/photocopies of testimonials Self-attested scanned/photocopies of certificates Other supporting documents as applicable Transaction slip/proof of application fee payment (except for SC/ST/PWD and Women candidates) The notification does not specify an exact list of individual certificates (such as caste certificate, experience certificate format, etc.); candidates should refer to the official application form for the complete document checklist.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The duly completed application form, along with self-attested scanned/photocopies of testimonials, certificates, and supporting documents, must reach the following address by post or by hand, on or before 09/08/2026: The Registrar, National Sports University, 2nd Floor, Olympic Bhavan, Khuman Lampak Sports Complex, Imphal - 795001 Candidates must mention "Application for the post of (Contractual)" on top of the envelope. Submission of the hard copy of the application form along with all supporting documents is mandatory. Applications received only through email, without the corresponding hard copy, will not be considered. Separate applications must be submitted for each post applied for.

faq.question: Q1. What is NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 about?
faq.answer: National Sports University, Imphal has invited applications under Advertisement No. 13/2026 for 11 Contractual Teaching and Non-Teaching posts, including 7 categories of Assistant Professor and 2 Non-Teaching posts (Junior Engineer and Public Relations Officer).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 9 Teaching vacancies (across Sports Coaching, Physical Education, Sports Psychology, and Sports Nutrition) and 2 Non-Teaching vacancies (Junior Engineer – Civil, and Public Relations Officer), making a total of 11 vacancies.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Assistant Professor posts at NSU Imphal?
faq.answer: All Assistant Professor (Teaching) posts carry a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. Is NET mandatory for Assistant Professor (Sports Coaching) posts?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that NET/SLET/SET is not required for the Sports Coaching discipline (Athletics, Shooting, Weightlifting, Badminton), as these tests are not conducted by UGC, CSIR, or any UGC-recognized agency for this discipline.

faq.question: Q5. Is NET required for Assistant Professor (Physical Education, Sports Psychology, Sports Nutrition)?
faq.answer: Yes, NET (or SLET/SET where applicable) is required, unless the candidate holds a Ph.D. awarded as per UGC (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016, in which case NET/SLET/SET is exempted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age limit is specified only for Non-Teaching posts: 35 years for Junior Engineer (Civil) and 40 years for Public Relations Officer. No age limit is mentioned for Teaching (Assistant Professor) posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,000/- (non-refundable), payable to HDFC Bank, Chingmeirong Branch. SC/ST/PWD candidates and Women candidates are exempted from this fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the last date to apply for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the application to reach the Registrar's office (by post or by hand) is 09/08/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply for NSU Imphal Recruitment 2026 through email only?
faq.answer: No. The notification explicitly states that applications received only through email, without the corresponding hard copy, will not be considered. Submission of the hard copy is mandatory.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply for more than one post in this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, but you must submit a separate application for each post you are applying for.
